params.value: SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, Name, AccountId, Account.Name, RecordType.Name, dateTimestampContractreceived__c, Winback_Pilot__c FROM Opportunity WHERE IsWon = true AND dateTimestampContractreceived__c >= 2026-01-01 AND dateTimestampContractreceived__c <= 2026-03-31 AND RecordType.Name != 'Customer Self Service' AND OwnerId IN ('0059L000000JKG9QAO','005W7000000zmHSIAY','005W7000009NCmTIAW','0051v00000BjKXAAA3','0059L000000JKFlQAO','005W7000005SzP3IAK','005W7000005SxQTIA0','005W7000004vQt7IAE','005W7000005WNTFIA4','0059L000000IlsvQAC','0059L000000JKGDQA4','005W7000002HR5tIAG','005W70000048JRNIA2','005W7000003UovJIAS','0059L000000JKGOQA4','005W7000004vQptIAE') ORDER BY OwnerId, dateTimestampContractreceived__c DESC LIMIT 2000

CUSTOM_ACTION.path: query/?q=SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, Name, AccountId, Account.Name, RecordType.Name, dateTimestampContractreceived__c, Winback_Pilot__c FROM Opportunity WHERE IsWon = true AND dateTimestampContractreceived__c >= 2026-01-01 AND dateTimestampContractreceived__c <= 2026-03-31 AND RecordType.Name != 'Customer Self Service' AND OwnerId IN ('0059L000000JKG9QAO','005W7000000zmHSIAY','005W7000009NCmTIAW','0051v00000BjKXAAA3','0059L000000JKFlQAO','005W7000005SzP3IAK','005W7000005SxQTIA0','005W7000004vQt7IAE','005W7000005WNTFIA4','0059L000000IlsvQAC','0059L000000JKGDQA4','005W7000002HR5tIAG','005W70000048JRNIA2','005W7000003UovJIAS','0059L000000JKGOQA4','005W7000004vQptIAE') ORDER BY OwnerId, dateTimestampContractreceived__c DESC LIMIT 2000
